view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for 'No permanent event type clutter' is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for 'No permanent event type clutter' is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided confirms that the system generates a temporary link for a one-off meeting, which aligns with the requirement of avoiding permanent event types. The linked use case explicitly states that the system creates a temporary link that expires after the meeting, thus preventing any permanent clutter. Additionally, the prior step evidence supports this by detailing the booking process and the temporary nature of the event.
